item.title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
item.description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
media:content.media:description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.

item.title: Old-Shop Finish in Forging
item.description: A forged cable axe with a finish that has that old-shop feel you can’t fake.

item.title: The Pineapple Twist in Final Shape
item.description: A blacksmithing piece where the final shape really shines, with metalworking and forging focused on the finishing twist.

item.title: A Simple Build That Smarts Up the Shop
item.description: A simple build with a result that makes the whole shop smarter. Blacksmithing, metalworking, and fabrication in a practical shop project.

item.title: Reading Steel by Heat Color
item.description: The steel gives away the story the moment the heat comes up. A close look at heat color in blacksmithing and metalworking.

item.title: Forging Rivet Headers in the Forge
item.description: A calm blacksmithing look at forging rivet headers and shaping useful shop tools with heat, precision, and traditional metalworking skill.

item.title: A Small Forge Job, Big Shop Fix
